text: Nau com mang di lam thay vi dat app — tiet kiem 50-80K/ngay, ~1.5 trieu/thang.
Meal prep Chu nhat: nau san 5 hop com trua, tiet kiem ~300K/tuan so voi an ngoai.
Mua thuc pham o cho thay vi sieu thi co the re hon 20-30%. Uu tien di cho buoi sang som.
Dat do an qua app? Dung quen check voucher truoc khi dat. Shopee Coins, MoMo, ZaloPay thuong co giam 20-50K.
Mang binh nuoc tu nha — 1 chai nuoc mua ngoai 10-15K x 22 ngay = 220-330K/thang bay mat.
Dat tra sua 2-3 lan/tuan? Giam xuong 1 lan/tuan tiet kiem 200-400K/thang.
Dat Grab/Be sau 21h thuong re hon 20-30% nho it nguoi dat. Neu khong gap, doi toi muon.
Di xe buyt/metro cho cac tuyen co dinh — ve thang chi 200K so voi 50-80K/ngay xe may/Grab.
Carpool voi dong nghieu cung tuyen — chia doi tien xang, tiet kiem 500K-1tr/thang.
Bao duong xe dinh ky (thay nhot, bom lop) giup tiet kiem xang 10-15%.
Ap dung quy tac 24h: muon mua gi tren 500K, doi 24h. 70% truong hop ban se khong mua nua.
Flash sale Shopee/Lazada: dat lich nhac truoc, them vao gio hang san, thanh toan bang the co cashback.
So sanh gia tren nhieu nen tang truoc khi mua. Dung web so sanh gia nhu websosanh.vn.
Mua do second-hand chat luong cao (dien tu, noi that) o Cho Tot — tiet kiem 40-60% so voi mua moi.
Unsubscribe email marketing tu cac shop — bot cam do, bot mua sam bo xung.
Tat dieu hoa khi ra khoi phong — 1 gio dieu hoa ton 1-2K dien, ca thang tiet kiem 300-600K.
Chuyen sang goi cuoc di dong re hon — nhieu nha mang co goi 77-99K/thang du data va goi.
Thanh toan hoa don dien/nuoc/internet qua vi dien tu thuong duoc hoan 1-5%.
Dung bong den LED thay bong soi dot — tiet kiem 75% dien chieu sang.
Rut phich cam sac dien thoai, laptop khi khong dung — dien tu 'ma' ton 5-10% hoa don dien.
Chia se tai khoan Netflix/Spotify/YouTube Premium voi ban be — chia 4 nguoi chi con 30-40K/nguoi/thang.
Tim su kien mien phi trong thanh pho: trien lam, hoa nhac, workshop — vui ma khong ton tien.
Doc sach qua thu vien hoac app doc mien phi (Waka trial, thu vien so) thay vi mua sach moi.
Dat auto-transfer vao tai khoan tiet kiem moi ngay luong. Tien ban khong thay = tien ban khong tieu.
Theo quy tac 50/30/20: 50% nhu cau, 30% mong muon, 20% tiet kiem. Dieu chinh theo thu nhap thuc te.
Lap quy du phong = 6 thang chi tieu. Day la 'bao hiem' quan trong nhat truoc khi nghi den dau tu.
Tra no lai cao truoc (the tin dung 2-4%/thang, vay tieu dung). Lai kep se 'an' tien cua ban nhanh hon ban tuong.
Ghi chep chi tieu moi ngay — chi can 30 giay nhan tin cho bot. Biet minh tieu gi moi tiet kiem duoc.
Moi khi duoc tang luong, tang tiet kiem truoc, tang chi tieu sau. Tranh 'lifestyle inflation'.
Khong vay tien de dau tu. Chi dau tu bang tien nhan roi — tien mat di khong anh huong cuoc song.
Uong ca phe pha tai nha — 1 goi ca phe 5-10K pha duoc 2-3 ly, so voi 40-60K/ly quan.
Mua hang theo mua giam gia: Black Friday, 11.11, 12.12 — nhung chi mua thu THUC SU can.
Lam viec tu xa 1-2 ngay/tuan neu duoc — tiet kiem tien di lai + an trua.
Kiem tra lai suat gui tiet kiem online — thuong cao hon gui quay 0.5-1%/nam.
No the tin dung? Luon tra toan bo du no truoc han — lai suat 2-4%/thang la rat cao.
Mua combo thay vi mua le thuong re hon 15-20%. Ap dung cho ca phe, do an nhanh, sieu thi.
Xem phim ngay thuong (thu 2-5) re hon cuoi tuan 30-50%. Nhieu rap con co ngay hoi vien.
Dat muc tieu tiet kiem cu the: '10 trieu trong 3 thang' thay vi 'tiet kiem nhieu hon'. Cu the = de thuc hien.
Cashback apps (Shopback, Fundiin) hoan 1-10% khi mua sam online. It nhung tich lau thanh nhieu.
Review chi tieu cuoi moi tuan — chi 5 phut nhin lai giup ban dieu chinh kip thoi.
